criteria.name: Structured problem solving
criteria.description: Evidence of breaking ambiguous problems into clear workstreams or logic.
positive_signals: Problem, approach, and deliverable are clear

source.title: Generic public role-fit guidance

criteria.name: Business analysis
criteria.description: Evidence of analyzing business, market, operations, or organizational questions.

source.title: Generic public role-fit guidance

criteria.name: Market research
criteria.description: Evidence of collecting and synthesizing market, competitor, or customer information.
positive_signals: Research supports an insight or recommendation

source.title: Generic public role-fit guidance
source.notes: Manually curated from common public role expectations.

criteria.name: Slide or presentation communication
criteria.description: Evidence of communicating analysis through slides, decks, or presentations.

source.title: Generic public role-fit guidance

criteria.name: Quantitative analysis
criteria.description: Evidence of using numbers, models, or data to support a business conclusion.

source.title: Generic public role-fit guidance
source.notes: Manually curated from common public role expectations.

criteria.name: Teamwork and leadership evidence
criteria.description: Evidence of clear contribution in a team, leadership, club, or project setting.

criteria.name: Client or stakeholder communication
criteria.description: Evidence of communicating with users, clients, stakeholders, judges, or faculty.
positive_signals: Communication purpose and outcome are clear

source.title: Generic public role-fit guidance

criteria.name: Hypothesis-driven thinking
criteria.description: Evidence of forming, testing, or revising a hypothesis during analysis.
positive_signals: Shows reasoning path, not only final answer

source.title: Generic public role-fit guidance
source.notes: Manually curated from common public role expectations.

criteria.name: Measurable impact, action-result clarity, and truthfulness
criteria.description: Connects actions to results and uses measurable impact only when user-provided.
positive_signals: Bullet has action, analysis, and deliverable
negative_signals: Invented savings, revenue, or client impact

source.title: Generic public role-fit guidance
